title: Fuser Module Error
shortDescription: The fuser module has malfunctioned or overheated.
fullDescription: Error 010-351 indicates the fuser unit that bonds toner to paper is not operating within normal temperature parameters.

fixSteps.title: Power Cycle
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off the printer, wait 30 seconds, and turn it back on.

fixSteps.title: Check for Jams
fixSteps.instruction: Open all doors and trays. Remove any jammed or misaligned paper.

fixSteps.title: Reseat Consumables
fixSteps.instruction: Remove and firmly reinstall toner cartridges, drum cartridges, and waste containers.

fixSteps.title: Check Firmware
fixSteps.instruction: Navigate to the service menu and check for available firmware updates.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after power cycling and basic troubleshooting.

faq.q: What does Xerox error 010-351 mean?
faq.a: The fuser module has malfunctioned or overheated.

faq.q: How do I clear this error?
faq.a: Start with a power cycle. If that fails, follow the specific fix steps for this error code.

faq.q: Do I need a service call?
faq.a: Many Xerox errors can be resolved by the user. Service is needed for hardware failures.

title: Internal Software Error
